X - Ray Right Foot AP & Oblique Views

anomalies.insight: Delhi morning (10:00) is 2.3σ below its 7-day range AND down 41 orders vs same day last week. This is not a D-2 artifact — D-8 (Wednesday) was also normal. Sustained morning weakness in Delhi is a week-over-week trend, not a one-day blip.

Gurgaon CBC is 4σ below range and down 21 orders week-on-week. The weekly comparison confirms the daily signal — CBC fulfilment in Gurgaon is structurally underperforming vs both last day and last week.
Delhi 14:00 is 2.2σ below range and down 33 orders week-on-week. Middle-of-day demand in Delhi is consistently weaker this week vs last — broader than a single-day anomaly.

CRP nationally is 1.1σ below range and down 60 orders week-on-week — largest absolute weekly decline among flagged SKUs. Across multiple cities and channels, suggesting category-level demand softness or a listing/pricing issue that has persisted across the week.

Noida Telesales is 2.5σ below range and up 24 orders week-on-week (recovering vs D-8). The weekly comparison flips the signal — Telesales in Noida may have had an unusually bad D-8 and is partially recovering. Monitor for trend confirmation.

Total IgE via App/web is 3.3σ above range and down 16 orders week-on-week. The weekly direction is opposite to the daily spike — D-1 was above range despite being lower than D-8. Suggests D-2 was an anomalously high day for this test, making D-1 look normal in weekly context.

Bangalore LFT is 2.3σ above range and up 23 orders week-on-week. The weekly confirmation makes this a more credible trend signal — LFT demand in Bangalore is growing both day-over-day and week-over-week.
D-1 (16) is outside control range (mean=5.1, 4.1σ ABOVE UCL). Monitor over next 2–3 days.

Ghaziabad App/web is uniquely flagged in the weekly comparison. Part of the NCR cluster where Delhi and Noida are also underperforming — but Ghaziabad's weekly decline is more pronounced than its daily change suggests.

Thyroid Profile Total is below range and down 45 orders week-on-week. The weekly view surfaces this as a sustained decline in one of the highest-volume tests — not just a one-day drop. Check App search ranking and promotional activity for thyroid tests.
D-1 (12) is outside control range (mean=28.1, 2.0σ BELOW LCL). Monitor over next 2–3 days.
